$description: C2 CORE tokens — brand- and domain-agnostic. Three tiers: primitive (raw values, no intent), semantic (intent-named aliases of primitives), and dimension (radius/space). A consuming product themes the system by swapping primitives only; semantic names never change. CORE must never reference c2-domain values.

primitive.$description: Tier 1 — raw values with no intent. Never reference these directly in app code; reach for a semantic token instead.

white.$description: Pure white. Base for translucent surface overlays.

black.$description: Pure black. Base for the selection ring tint.

surface.$description: The dark control-room elevation ramp. Each step is white mixed into #141414 at a fixed overlay ratio (0 / 0.05 / 0.08 / 0.11 / 0.14).

0.$description: Base — page background and card content area.

2.$description: Overlay — borders and dividers, card container fill.

3.$description: Inset — icon boxes and closure buttons.

4.$description: Hover — sensor rows and hover states.

neutral.$description: Foreground greys for text on the dark surface ramp.

red.$description: Perceptually-uniform red ramp (oklch) for destructive actions.

hover.$description: Destructive hover — one lightness step up.

active.$description: Destructive pressed — one lightness step down.

amber.$description: Perceptually-uniform amber ramp (oklch) for warning actions.

hover.$description: Warning hover — one lightness step up.

active.$description: Warning pressed — one lightness step down.

semantic.$description: Tier 2 — intent-named aliases of primitives. This is the layer app code and components should consume. Swapping a primitive re-themes every semantic token that references it.

base.$description: Lowest surface — page and card-content background.

raised.$description: Raised surface — cards, sidebar, code panels.

inset.$description: Recessed wells — icon boxes, closure buttons.

ring.$description: Focus-visible ring color (applied at reduced opacity by components).

interactive.$description: Border radius for all interactive elements — buttons, badges, chips. The system's signature 4px corner.
